title: event — trait composition
description: Two owned traits — `BelongsToEvent` for downstream models that carry an `event_id` FK (Session Wave 3b, teams::EventTeam Wave 2b nullable), and `HasEventFacilities` for the Event model itself. Order matters: BelongsToTenant precedes BelongsToOrganization precedes BelongsToBranch precedes BelongsToSeason precedes owned traits.

owned.description: Mixed into downstream models carrying an Event FK. Adds `event()` belongsTo relation, `resolveInEvent(?Event $event = null)` query scope filtering `WHERE event_id = ?` with `Request::activeEvent()` fallback, and a booted() hook filling event_id from active-event context on creating (opt-in per-model via bool $fillEventOnCreating). Refuses cross-tenant FK smuggling at save time.
usedBy: session::Session (nullable event_id — a session may or may not be part of an event's schedule)
teams::EventTeam (nullable event_id in Wave 2b — Wave 3 migration makes required + FK-constrained)
athlete-enrollment::AthleteEnrollment (Wave 3+ — some enrollments target a specific event vs. a season)
composition_notes: Order: BelongsToTenant -> BelongsToOrganization? -> BelongsToBranch? -> BelongsToSeason? -> BelongsToEvent. Event fills against a resolved branch/season when both are relevant.
The fillOnCreating hook is opt-in per model — Session opts in; EventTeam does not (it's always explicit).
The trait publishes an additional scope `currentEventOnly()` filtering to rows in an active event.

owned.description: Mixed into the Event model itself. Exposes `facilities()` hasMany (via event_facilities pivot) + `primaryFacility()` hasOne (WHERE is_primary=true) + computed accessors `facilityCount()` + `hasPrimaryFacility()`. Also publishes `attachFacility($facilityId, purpose='competition', primary=false)` + `detachFacility($eventFacilityId)` + `setPrimaryFacility($eventFacilityId)` mutation helpers that route through the observer.
composition_notes: This trait is ONLY for the Event model.
The mutation helpers route through the observer to preserve invariants (auto-demote previous primary, refuse multi-facility below entitlement, etc.).

organization.reason: Required FK — every event belongs to an organization.

season.reason: Optional FK — stand-alone events are allowed.

audit.reason: Event mutations write to the `audits` table — every one of them is compliance-relevant, and financial/eligibility changes are 7-year retention.

activity.reason: Event lifecycle events feed the tenant admin's product-facing activity feed.

event.notes: Order matters. BelongsToTenant first. BelongsToOrganization is required (event.organization_id is required). NO BelongsToApplication — Events do NOT carry application_id.

event_facility.notes: Pivot row. Composes BelongsToEvent (owned) rather than BelongsToFacility because the ownership perspective is event-centric — the pivot is authored/managed from the event side.
